WELL.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of WELL is 108 nm.

WELL.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of WELL is 54 nm.

WELL.A.1A.rule: Minimum area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.

WELL.A.1B.rule: Minimum enclosed area of WELL is 5832 nm-sq.

FIN.W.1.rule: Exact vertical FIN width is 7 nm.

FIN.W.2.rule: Minimum horizontal FIN width is 108 nm.

GATE.W.1.rule: GATE.W.1 Exact horizontal GATE width is 20 nm.

GATE.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical GATE width is 40 nm.

ACTIVE.W.1.rule: Minimum vertical width of ACTIVE layer is 27 nm.

ACTIVE.W.2.rule: ACTIVE layer vertical width increment is an integer multiple of 27 nm.
ACTIVE.W.2.script:
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE < 0.027 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.027 < 0.054 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.054 < 0.081 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.081 < 0.108 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.108 < 0.135 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.135 < 0.162 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.162 < 0.189 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.189 < 0.216 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.216 < 0.243 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.243 < 0.270 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.270 < 0.297 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.297 < 0.324 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.324 < 0.351 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.351 < 0.378 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.378 < 0.405 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.405 < 0.432 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.432 < 0.459 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.459 < 0.486 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.486 < 0.513 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.513 < 0.540 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.540 < 0.567 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.567 < 0.594 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.594 < 0.621 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.621 < 0.648 OPPOSITE 
INTERNAL ACTIVE_HE > 0.648 < 0.675 OPPOSITE

ACTIVE.W.3.rule: Minimum horizontal width of ACTIVE is 16 nm.

GCUT.W.1.rule: Minimum vertical width of GCUT is 17 nm.

GCUT.AUX.3.rule: GCUT.AUX.3 GCUT may not interact with channel.

NSELECT.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of NSELECT is 108 nm.

NSELECT.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of NSELECT is 54 nm.

PSELECT.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of PSELECT is 108 nm.

PSELECT.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of PSELECT is 54 nm.

SLVT.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of SLVT is 108 nm.

SLVT.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of SLVT is 54 nm.

LVT.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of LVT is 108 nm.

LVT.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of LVT is 54 nm.

SRAMVT.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of SRAMVT is 108 nm.

SRAMVT.W.2.rule: Minimum vertical width of SRAMVT is 54 nm.

DUMMY.W.1.rule: Width of dummy should be 40 nm

SDT.W.1.rule: SDT.W.1 Minimum horizontal width of SDT is 24 nm.

LISD.W.1.rule: LISD.W.1 Minimum width of LISD is 24 nm.

LISD.A.1.rule: LISD.A.1 Minimum LISD area is 648 nm-sq.

LIG.W.1.rule: LIG.W.1 Minimum width of LIG is 16 nm.

LIG.A.1.rule: LIG.A.1 Minimum LIG area is 324 nm-sq.

M1.W.1.rule: Minimum width of M1 is 18 nm.

M2.W.1.rule: Minimum width of M2 is 18 nm.

M3.W.1.rule: Minimum width of M3 is 18 nm.

M4.W.1.rule: Minimum vertical width of M4 is 24 nm.

M4.W.2.rule: Maximum vertical width of M4 is 480 nm.
M4.W.2.script: INTERNAL M4_HE > 20*VAR_M4_1X < 10000*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M4.W.3.rule: M4 vertical width may not be an even integer multiple of its minimum width.
M4.W.3.script:
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  2*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  4*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  6*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  8*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 10*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 12*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 14*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 16*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 18*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 20*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M4.W.4.rule: M4 vertical width, resulting in the polygon spanning an even number of minimum width routing tracks vertically, is not allowed.
M4.W.4.script:
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  3*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE ==  7*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 11*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 15*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M4_HE == 19*VAR_M4_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M4.W.5.rule: Minimum horizontal width of M4 is 44 nm.

M4.AUX.1.rule: M4 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 24 nm.
M4.AUX.1.script: OFFGRID M4 1 VAR_M4_1X_DBU OFFSET 0 VAR_M4_YOFFSET HINT

M5.W.1.rule: Minimum horizontal width of M5 is 24 nm.

M5.W.2.rule: Maximum horizontal width of M5 is 480 nm.
M5.W.2.script: INTERNAL M5_VE > 20*VAR_M5_1X < 10000*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M5.W.3.rule: M5 horizontal width may not be an even integer multiple of its minimum width.
M5.W.3.script:
INTERNAL M5_VE ==  2*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE ==  4*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE ==  6*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE ==  8*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 10*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 12*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 14*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 16*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 18*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 20*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M5.W.4.rule: M5 horizontal width, resulting in the polygon spanning an even number of minimum width routing tracks horizontally, is not allowed.
M5.W.4.script:
INTERNAL M5_VE ==  3*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE ==  7*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 11*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 15*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M5_VE == 19*VAR_M5_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M5.W.5.rule: Minimum vertical width of M5 is 44 nm.

M5.AUX.1.rule: M5 vertical edges must be at a grid of 24 nm.
M5.AUX.1.script: OFFGRID M5 VAR_M5_1X_DBU 1 OFFSET VAR_M5_XOFFSET 0 HINT

M6.W.1.rule: Minimum vertical width of M6 is 32 nm.

M6.W.2.rule: Maximum vertical width of M6 is 640 nm.
M6.W.2.script: INTERNAL M6_HE > 20*VAR_M6_1X < 10000*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

INTERNAL M6_HE ==  6*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  8*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 10*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 12*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 14*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 16*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 18*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 20*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M6.W.4.script:
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  3*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE ==  7*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 11*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 15*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M6_HE == 19*VAR_M6_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M6.W.5.rule: Minimum horizontal width of M6 is 44 nm.

M6.AUX.1.rule: M6 horizontal edges must be at a grid of 32 nm.
M6.AUX.1.script: OFFGRID M6 1 VAR_M6_1X_DBU OFFSET 0 VAR_M6_YOFFSET HINT

M7.W.2.rule: Maximum horizontal width of M7 is 640 nm.
M7.W.2.script: INTERNAL M7_VE > 20*VAR_M7_1X < 10000*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

INTERNAL M7_VE ==  6*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE ==  8*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 10*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 12*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 14*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0 
INTERNAL M7_VE == 16*VAR_M7_1X REGION OPPOSITE PARALLEL ONLY PROJ > 0

M7.W.5.rule: Minimum vertical width of M7 is 44 nm.

M7.AUX.1.rule: M7 vertical edges must be at a grid of 32 nm.
M7.AUX.1.script: OFFGRID M7 VAR_M7_1X_DBU 1 OFFSET VAR_M7_XOFFSET 0 HINT

M8.W.1.rule: Minimum width of M8 is 40 nm.

M8.W.2.rule: Minimum width of M8, when its length >= 400 nm and < 1200 nm, is 60 nm.
M8.W.2.script:
X = LENGTH M8 > 0.4 < 1.2 
Y = M8 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.060

M8.W.3.rule: Minimum width of M8, when its length >= 1200 nm and < 1800 nm, is 80 nm.
M8.W.3.script:
X = LENGTH M8 >=1.2 < 1.8 
Y = M8 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.080

M8.W.4.rule: Minimum width of M8, when its length >= 1800 nm, is 120 nm.
M8.W.4.script:
X = LENGTH M8 >=1.8 
Y = M8 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.12

M8.W.5.rule: Maximum width of M8 is 2000 nm.

M8.A.1.rule: Minimum area of M8 is 7520 nm-sq.

M8.L.1.rule: Minimum feature length of M8 is 40 nm.
M8.L.1.script: CONVEX EDGE M8 ANGLE1 == 90 ANGLE2 > 90 WITH LENGTH < 0.040

M9.W.1.rule: Minimum width of M9 is 40 nm.

M9.W.2.rule: Minimum width of M9, when its length >= 400 nm and < 1200 nm, is 60 nm.
M9.W.2.script:
X = LENGTH M9 > 0.4 < 1.2 
Y = M9 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.060

M9.W.3.rule: Minimum width of M9, when its length >= 1200 nm and < 1800 nm, is 80 nm.
M9.W.3.script:
X = LENGTH M9 >=1.2 < 1.8 
Y = M9 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.080

M9.W.4.rule: Minimum width of M9, when its length >= 1800 nm, is 120 nm.
M9.W.4.script:
X = LENGTH M9 >=1.8 
Y = M9 WITH EDGE X 
INTERNAL Y < 0.12

M9.W.5.rule: Maximum width of M9 is 2000 nm.

M9.A.1.rule: Minimum area of M9 is 7520 nm-sq.

M9.L.1.rule: Minimum feature length of M9 is 40 nm.
M9.L.1.script: CONVEX EDGE M9 ANGLE1 == 90 ANGLE2 > 90 WITH LENGTH < 0.040

V8.W.1.rule: Exact width of a V8 instance is [40 nm x 40 nm | 40 nm x 120 nm | 120 nm x 40 nm].
V8.W.1.script:
x= NOT RECTANGLE V8 == 0.04 BY ==0.04 
y= NOT RECTANGLE V8 == 0.12 BY ==0.04 
z= NOT RECTANGLE V8 == 0.04 BY ==0.12 
x AND (y AND z)
constraints: Or(And(self.width==40, self.height==40), And(self.width==40, self.height==120), And(self.width==120, self.height==40))

V9.W.1.rule: Exact width of a V9 instance is [40 nm x 40 nm | 40 nm x 120 nm | 120 nm x 40 nm].
V9.W.1.script:
x= NOT RECTANGLE V9 == 0.04 BY ==0.04 
y= NOT RECTANGLE V9 == 0.12 BY ==0.04 
z= NOT RECTANGLE V9 == 0.04 BY ==0.12 
x AND (y AND z)
constraints: Or(And(self.width == 40, self.height == 40), And(self.width == 40, self.height == 120), And(self.width == 120, self.height == 40))
